description:
Replace the current brittle `/bw adopt` concept with an explicit plan-driven workflow. The extension should consume a real written markdown proposal/plan and drive an LLM-assisted decomposition flow, instead of scraping recent session text and hoping bullets/numbers parse correctly.

This epic tracks the redesign from parser-heavy heuristics to a prompt/tool-driven workflow that better fits real beadwork planning.
title: Redesign `/bw adopt` into an explicit plan-to-graph workflow
